category_sources: source_facts.description says it is a compiler for the GObject type system; docs.vala.dev describes Vala as a programming language using GObject.
display_name_sources: docs.vala.dev and vala.dev use the project name Vala.
docs_sources: docs.vala.dev is the current official documentation site and links to the reference manual and generated API references.
repo_sources: docs.vala.dev links to the Vala Compiler Repository; the Vala docs identify the GNOME software repository clone URL as gitlab.gnome.org/GNOME/vala.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables list valac, valadoc, vapigen; docs.vala.dev describes the language, compiler, and GObject/GNOME focus.
